title: Brown Wood Filler 500g with Flexible 3" Filling Tool – Interior & Exterior Wood Repair Putty | Quick-Drying, Paintable, Easy Application for Cracks, Holes & Gaps
features: BROWN WOOD FILLER 500G FOR INTERIOR & EXTERIOR USE: Designed for seamless repairs to wooden surfaces including floors, doors, skirting boards, and furniture – ideal for both softwoods and hardwoods.
FLEXIBLE 3" FILLING TOOL INCLUDED: Smooth and bendable applicator ensures clean, precise application of filler with less mess and faster results – perfect for DIY wood repairs.
QUICK-DRYING WOOD PUTTY FOR FAST FIXES: Reduces wait time so you can sand and finish sooner; great for projects where speed and efficiency matter.
PAINTABLE AND STAINABLE FINISH: Accepts paint, wood stain, or varnish for a perfect match to existing wood tones – no cracking or shrinking after drying.
FILLER FOR CRACKS, HOLES, GAPS & DENTS: Ideal for small and large imperfections; this brown wood filler provides long-lasting, shrink-resistant repairs indoors and outdoors.
description: Repair wooden surfaces quickly and professionally with this ready-to-use Brown Wood Filler 500g . Suitable for both interior and exterior wood repairs , this filler is ideal for filling cracks, holes, gaps, and surface imperfections on doors, floors, furniture, and more. Includes a flexible 3" filling tool to help you apply filler cleanly and precisely with minimal mess – great for both beginners and experienced DIYers. Key Features: 500g of brown wood filler for deep and shallow repairs Quick-drying formula saves time and increases efficiency Paintable and stainable finish for seamless blending Ideal for cracks, holes, dents, and wood surface damage Flexible 3" applicator included for easy, clean application This professional-grade wood repair putty is easy to sand, resists shrinking, and leaves a strong, durable finish. Great for use on skirting boards, window frames, doors, and outdoor timber structures.
